### **📄 FILE 1: login.html (UPDATED)**

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>

````

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        }

            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>

````

    <div class="container">

                    required

                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"

            text-decoration: underline;

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>

            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->

                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"

            <div class="form-group">

                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
````

            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
````

            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
````

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {

            display: none;

            display: block;

            border-radius: 4px;

            background-color: #d4edda;

            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }

<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

            color: #764ba2;
        }

        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {

        }

        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>

            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>

                    type="text"

        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

            width: 100%;

        }

        }

            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;

        }

            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;

            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */

            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

            display: block;

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {

        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

            border-radius: 4px;

            font-weight: 500;
        }

            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
                    >
                    <!-- Password toggle button with inline SVG icons -->
                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````

            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
                    >
                    <!-- Password toggle button with inline SVG icons -->
                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

### **📄 FILE 1: login.html (UPDATED)**

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
                    >
                    <!-- Password toggle button with inline SVG icons -->
                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````

                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````

### **📄 FILE 1: login.html (UPDATED)**

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
                    >
                    <!-- Password toggle button with inline SVG icons -->
                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````

        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````

### **📄 FILE 1: login.html (UPDATED)**

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login - To-Do App</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            text-align: center;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #555;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        input[type="text"],
        input[type="password"] {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        input[type="text"]:focus,
        input[type="password"]:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        }

        button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .link-section {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .link-section a {
            color: #667eea;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .link-section a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        /* Password container - ensures toggle never overlaps text */
        .password-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .password-container input {
            width: 100%;
            padding-right: 40px; /* Space for icon */
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Password toggle button - positioned absolutely inside container */
        .password-toggle {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #667eea;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .password-toggle:hover {
            color: #764ba2;
        }

        /* SVG icon sizing within toggle button */
        .password-toggle svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            stroke: currentColor;
        }

        /* SVG visibility toggle - first SVG shows by default, second shows when .show class added */
        .password-toggle svg:first-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        .password-toggle svg:last-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:first-of-type {
            display: none;
        }

        .password-toggle.show svg:last-of-type {
            display: block;
        }

        #message {
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        #message.success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            display: block;
        }

        #message.error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Welcome Back</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Login to your To-Do App account</p>
        <div id="message"></div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            <!-- SECURITY: CSRF token to prevent cross-site attacks -->
            <input type="hidden" id="csrf_token" name="csrf_token" value="">

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="username">Username:</label>
                <input
                    type="text"
                    id="username"
                    name="username"
                    placeholder="Enter your username"
                    required
                    autofocus
                >
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
                <label for="password">Password:</label>
                <div class="password-container">
                    <input
                        type="password"
                        id="password"
                        name="password"
                        placeholder="Enter your password"
                        required
                        autocomplete="current-password"
                    >
                    <!-- Password toggle button with inline SVG icons -->
                    <button type="button" class="password-toggle" aria-label="Show password" title="Show password">
                        <!-- Show password (open eye) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z"/>
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/>
                        </svg>
                        <!-- Hide password (closed eye with slash) -->
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M17.94 17.94A10.94 10.94 0 0 1 12 20c-7 0-11-8-11-8a21.86 21.86 0 0 1 5.06-6.94M9.88 9.88A3 3 0 0 0 12 15a3 3 0 0 0 2.12-5.12"/>
                            <line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>

        <div class="link-section">
            Don't have an account? <a href="register.html">Register here</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Lightweight JavaScript for login functionality -->
    <script src="login.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
````
